migrations.title: Migrating from Cline to Roo Code
migrations.description: Roo Code is a fork of Cline with additional modes and orchestration features.

steps.title: Settings
steps.description: API keys transfer automatically from VS Code settings
steps.notes: Check Roo Code settings to verify provider config

steps.title: Custom modes
steps.after: Create .roomodes in project root with custom mode definitions
steps.notes: Cline does not have this feature
